title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider LLM workflows by running a coding task across four configurations varying which model (Claude Opus or Kimi K2.6) handled planning versus implementation. An Opus evaluator scored results across seven dimensions on three real GitHub issues to determine the optimal provider split.
